name: eval-only
hypothesis: Remove adversary entirely. Merge challenge responsibility into a strengthened evaluator with structured verification checklist and edge-case probing. If quality holds, adversary phase is pure overhead. Saves ~12 min and one agent call per cycle.

changes.planner: Unchanged from cand-0001. Coverage matrix + 4 DoD/feature.
changes.evaluator: Expanded: now does edge-case probing (adversary's job) + zero-tolerance eval in one pass. Structured output with verification table + edge-case audit.
changes.skill: 3-phase workflow: PLAN → BUILD → EVAL. No challenge phase. Evaluator timeout increased to 25 min.
